gist.headline: The manual gets an upgrade
gist.blurb: We've polished up the documentation for our media service. Expect accurate file limits, proper header examples, and clear retention policies.
gist.summary: Updated the media.pollinations.ai documentation to reflect the actual 24MB file limit, correct header usage, and detail retention policies.
gist.impact: Developers can now integrate media uploads more easily with accurate code examples and clear constraints.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee reading a large, glowing manual or scroll in a cozy library setting. The Nomnom creature is eating an old, incorrect page of documentation, symbolizing the removal of outdated info.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, studying a glowing digital manual on a retro computer terminal. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a crumpled piece of paper nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
